rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER MACKENZIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Consolidate Cases Pes-14-298241 And Cgc-14-541190
rulings.Rulings: David Baker's motion to consolidate cases PES-14-298241 and CGC-14-541190 is GRANTED. The cases are consolidated for all purposes, and the civil case -- CGC-14-541190 -- will be designated the lead case. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party contesting the tentative ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than February 3, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
